benefits.description: 9-Me-BC allowed therapeutic effect at 20mg dextroamphetamine compared to previously needing 90-150mg just to function
9-Me-BC regenerates dopaminergic neurons, described as only thing to restore pre-amphetamine baseline cognition

protocol_notes: Also uses Uridine + fish oil. Considering bromantane. Notes 9-Me-BC is experimental with potential risks including photosensitivity and MAOI-A effects. Recommends low tyramine diet, sunglasses, and sunscreen while on 9-Me-BC. Had multiple ER trips due to cardiovascular issues from amphetamine use. Currently using amphetamine responsibly after regenerative therapy.
